title: Lanpn 14 Pcs 16.5cm Large Candy Cane Christmas Tree Decorations, Giant Xmas Peppermint Baubles, Red White Lollipop Candy Canes Ornaments, Sweet Hanging Decor for Candyland Party Holiday Indoor Outdoor
features: 【Sweet & Festive Designs】This large Christmas candy cane decoration set includes 14 plastic candy-themed decorations in 5 retro styles—peppermint candy, candy cane, lollipop, and more—to delight your guests with festive charm

【Durable & Shatterproof】Each Xmas peppermint candy bauble is made from UV-resistant, shatterproof plastic with glitter accents. Won’t fade or break—use year after year to brighten your holiday traditions

【Versatile Holiday Decor】Use these giant Christmas candy cane ornament pieces on trees, wreaths, mantels, porches, garden railings, or party tables. Great for indoor and outdoor Christmas, weddings, or themed events

【Easy Hanging & Lightweight】Every oversized Christmas tree hanging decoration comes with a gold buckle and hanging rope for easy placement. Lightweight design won't damage branches and takes minutes to install
【Charming Gift Set】This 14-piece big Christmas tree bauble set makes a perfect holiday gift. Share sweetness and joy with loved ones and give your Christmas tree a colorful, one-of-a-kind look
